body: Mr. C Hotel & Residences, located in the heart of Downtown West Palm Beach, represents the ultimate embodiment of modern luxury living.

Crafted by Terra and Sympatico Real Estate, this 25-story architectural marvel encompasses 110 hotel rooms and 146 branded residences, offering a diverse range of one to four-bedroom options spanning from 830 to 2200 square feet. Among the 146 condos, approximately 46 will be available as suites or condos that can be included in the hotel reservation system.
This visionary project is the brainchild of the esteemed Cipriani family, renowned for their iconic restaurants and exceptional hospitality.

Building upon their successful ventures in Miami, Ignazio, and Maggio Cipriani have gracefully infused their distinctive style and sophistication into this development, creating a sanctuary for those who truly appreciate the art of refined living.
Mr. C Hotel & Residences will stand as a modern classic, seamlessly melding timeless sensibilities with contemporary elegance.

The 25-story tower will be multifunctional, with the first eight floors housing the lobby, a restaurant, and around 46 residential suites for the condo/hotel program. The subsequent 10 floors will be dedicated to condo residences, followed by the top seven floors, which will host the hotel, rooftop pool, Bellini restaurant, and private club.

The condo will offer an array of amenities, including a fitness center, spa, yoga studio, dog run, Bocce court, children's playground, and barbecue area. Additionally, the hotel will provide amenities like a ballroom, lounge room, and library, accessible to condo residents who will also have access to their own private club on the eighth floor.
Construction of the Mr. C tower is scheduled to commence in early 2024 and is projected to take approximately two years, with an expected opening in the first quarter of 2026.

Ocean One's quality is unsurpassed residences feature expansive main living areas highlighted with soaring 10’ high ceilings, with floor to ceiling sliding glass doors that open to balconies and lush backyards.

These multi-level homes are accessed by both stairs and the owner’s private elevator. Both residences include the option of a third floor for a 4th bedroom or game room that opens to a dramatic rooftop terrace with covered outside bar. You will find two modern floor plans both are designed to promote modern living and entertaining.
The multitude of large windows throughout the home allow for an abundance of natural sunlight to flow into the home.

This area gives a true beach lifestyle that is both comfortable and opulent.The building features curated amenities, sophisticated organic interiors, thoughtfully designed floorplans, and expansive terraces for a lifestyle perfectly suited for the idyllic location.

This area gives a true beach lifestyle that is both comfortable and opulent. The building features curated amenities and sophisticated organic interiors. Some Key Features of Ocean Park South Beach are:
36’ Pool with Italian-designed poolside chaise lounges & umbrellas

The 76 floors with 389 units in the building. Residents have a choice of 1-3 bedrooms or studios, with sizes ranging from 450 to 2150 square feet.
With the building being located Downtown, residents have access to everything from the best dining options, to luxury retailers, and the art and design districts.

The building brings lots of open space with its 10 foot ceiling heights. Units are all stocked with top of the line appliances and smart home technology. The building houses three swimming pools including a Sky Pool on the 70th floor with panoramic views. Full service spas, bars, movie theatre, and chef and gastro kitchen are also located in the building.
The building strives to provide luxuries that enrich the lives of the people who visit and live here.

body: With its panoramic views of the Intracoastal Waterway, Palm Beach Island, and the Atlantic Ocean, Olara is a luxurious waterfront residential haven in the Palm Beaches. Olara is the newest and most exclusive development, distinguished by a private marina with direct Intracoastal access, and close proximity to top-notch shopping and restaurants.

Olara offers exquisitely designed two- to four-bedroom plus den residences and an amazing, two-acre suite of resort-inspired indoor and outdoor amenities and services. Rising 26 stories offering 275 superbly designed residences with a variety of floor plans. Gabellini Sheppard's interior designs exhibit a simple yet exquisite harmony of elements.

Each and every element is appealing and created with your peace of mind, wellbeing, and comfort in mind. Huge floor-to-ceiling windows that let in plenty of sunlight and provide panoramic views of the Intracoastal, the Atlantic Ocean, and the city opening up to gracious 10-foot deep terraces.

metaDescription: Luxury Condo living on the Bay at Onda Residences in Miami. View Onda Residences for sale.

An architectural landmark built to offer a privileged view from the privacy of each residence, with outdoor and indoor lounges luxuriously designed with an all-Italian touch.

At lobby level is the wellness area with a full private spa, a treatment room, sauna and steam room, an indoor yoga studio and a modern gym with state of the art Technogym cardio and strength training equipment, designed by award-winning Arquitectonica and landscaped by Enzo Enea.

The deck level features lush landscaping surrounding a rooftop pool area built to admire Miami. Onda Bay Harbor is the latest project envisioned by Valerio Morabito and Ugo Colombo with the exquisite interiors by interior design firm A++. Forty-one unique residences, with bright, luxurious interior spaces.
Enjoy the private gardens and the spacious terraces overlooking the peaceful Caribbean. Personalized services, security and technology are ready to satisfy residences requests.

body: One River Point, uniquely designed with symmetrical towers joined by a glass sky bridge 800 feet above the Miami River. With the buildings at 60 floors each, residences will have optimal light and views as the principal focus in the design of the building.

The double floor plan and extreme height allow for each unit to have uninterrupted exposure to the spectacular views of the river, city, and bay. The one- to five-bedroom condos range in size from 890 to 7,658 square feet. Additional to the indoor living space are the twelve-foot-deep, glass-enclosed terraces. Enjoy year-round outdoor living.
One River Point achieves a remarkable fusion of art and nature in one standout architectural declaration. Residents can expect pace, light, spectacular views, and uncompromising luxury as standard.

One River Point epitomizes the most masterfully choreographed riverfront residential enclave in Miami. Amenities and services provide residents an exceptional resort environment. One River Point also has the largest riverfront pool coming in at more than 130 feet long.

There is also a regulation-size lap pool for the energetic morning swimmers or wind down with a relaxing massage in the luxury spa. As its own private island, One River Point is committed to a healthy, relaxing lifestyle. With breathtaking views and full-day food and beverage service, there is no need to go anywhere else.

body: One Thousand Museum was created from the fusion of art, architecture, design, location, and luxury condos in Downtown Miami. This striking building will stand out for its unique appearance as a continuous piece of contemporary sculpture from the podium to the crown.

The ultimate highrise will house 83 residents ranging from townhomes to half-floor & full-floor homes to penthouses. Floors will host one or two residences with four- to six- bedrooms. Each home is built with oversized terraces encouraging residents to enjoy the beautiful views overlooking Biscayne Bay and Museum Park.

One Thousand Museum is also known as the Scorpion Tower celebrating its bold but sleek design. The tower’s curves reflect its internal organization as it rises more than 60 stories from arrival to the amenity levels, the residential floors above, and finally to a dramatic double-height amenity space on the top floor.

Offering an abundance of 30,000 square feet of beautifully designed venues for swimming, sunbathing, socializing, fitness, and pampering for less than 100 residents, One Thousand Museum creates a six-star lifestyle.
Residents can enjoy the masterfully built glass crown of 1000 Museum at the double-height aquatic center and sky lounge offering luxe venues for fitness, relaxation, and private events.

Arrival and departure will be easily accessible in the form of 24/7 valet and security, high-speed elevators with destination-entry smart technology, and a private rooftop helipad for easy access day or night to nearby islands, airports, and yachts.

Salt water pool with composite decking, fitness center & cabana. In heart of Las Olas, minutes to the beach, dining, shopping, theater of arts and FLL.

name: Palm Beach Beachfront Condos
metaDescription: Oceanfront and beach living in Palm Beach County — from direct-Atlantic towers to homes a barefoot walk from the sand.
body: There is no substitute for the ocean at your door. LiveModern curates Palm Beach County's beachfront and oceanfront condos — the direct-ocean residences, the private- and deeded-access homes, and the high-floor lines where the Atlantic fills every window.

We're precise about what “on the beach” actually means: oceanfront versus ocean view, private versus deeded versus public access, and, in the towers, the line and floor that make one residence far more valuable than the same square footage facing the other way. Explore the coast across West Palm Beach, Palm Beach, Jupiter, Palm Beach Gardens, Boca Raton, and Delray Beach.
Tell us how close to the sand you want to be and we'll send the residences that deliver it. Our agents know every stretch of this coastline.

name: Palm Beach Boating Homes
metaDescription: Deepwater living in Palm Beach County — ocean access, no fixed bridges, and dockage built for the way you run your boat.
body: For buyers who measure a home by what's tied up behind it, Palm Beach County is one of the great boating markets in the country. LiveModern curates the homes where the water actually works — deepwater dockage, ocean access to the inlet, and, on the best of them, no fixed bridges between your slip and open water.

We look past the listing photos to the things that matter to a boater: water depth at the dock, seawall condition, bridge clearances on the route to the inlet, and whether the property can hold the vessel you own or the one you're about to. Explore boating homes across West Palm Beach, Palm Beach, Jupiter, Palm Beach Gardens, Boca Raton, and Delray Beach.
Tell us your draft, your beam, and where you like to fish or cruise, and we'll send only the homes that genuinely fit. LiveModern's agents know these waterways firsthand.

name: Palm Beach Equestrian Homes

body: In a region that's largely subdivided, genuine acreage is the true luxury. LiveModern curates Palm Beach County's estate and equestrian homes — the ranch parcels, the gated compounds, and the equestrian properties with the zoning and infrastructure to match.

Land value follows use rights, so we read the zoning before you plan: what you can build, whether you can keep horses, and what a bridle-path or agricultural designation really conveys. Explore estates and acreage across West Palm Beach, Palm Beach, Jupiter, Palm Beach Gardens, Boca Raton, and Delray Beach.

LiveModern curates Palm Beach County's golf and country-club homes and, just as importantly, helps you understand the club behind each one — whether membership is mandatory, equity or non-equity, and what the dues and initiation really run.

From championship communities to more intimate clubs, we match the home to your game, your dining and racquet priorities, and your membership budget across West Palm Beach, Palm Beach, Jupiter, Palm Beach Gardens, Boca Raton, and Delray Beach. The right community is the one whose club fits how you actually want to spend your week.
Tell us the kind of golf and club life you're after, and we'll walk you through the homes and the membership structures together. Our agents know these communities from the inside.

name: Palm Beach Island Homes For Sale
metaDescription: Island living in Palm Beach County — the barrier islands and gated enclaves where the address itself is the scarcity.

body: An island address can't be replicated — the supply is fixed by the island itself. LiveModern curates Palm Beach County's island homes, from barrier-island towns to gated enclaves built on their own peninsulas, where controlled access and water on all sides define the life.

Island homes are almost always waterfront, so they carry every waterfront consideration plus the premium of being surrounded — and many are excellent for boaters. We help you weigh access, exposure, and construction quality across West Palm Beach, Palm Beach, Jupiter, Palm Beach Gardens, Boca Raton, and Delray Beach.
Tell us the kind of island life you want — town or enclave, bridge or causeway — and we'll curate what fits. Our agents know these islands and how each one lives.

LiveModern curates Palm Beach County's waterfront homes across the full spectrum — the open Atlantic, the protected Intracoastal, navigable canals, the Loxahatchee River, and quiet lakefront — so you can match the water to the way you actually want to live.

Some buyers want a boat behind the house; others want the sunset over the Intracoastal, or the calm of a lake. We help you read the differences that don't show up in a photo — exposure, seawalls, elevation, and dockage potential — across West Palm Beach, Palm Beach, Jupiter, Palm Beach Gardens, Boca Raton, and Delray Beach.
Share the kind of water you're drawn to and we'll curate the shortlist. Our agents know these shorelines and what each one is really like to own.

Comprised of two striking shoreline towers designed by Luis Revuelta, situated on a sprawling property spanning the waterfronts—from Ocean to Intracoastal—The Ritz-Carlton Residences, Pompano Beach give homeowners direct access to both a private Beach Club and private Yacht Club.

With a comprehensive array of extraordinary private amenities, staffed and serviced by the world’s preeminent luxury flag, The Ritz-Carlton Residences, Pompano Beach offer a transformative lifestyle and incomparable experiences.

name: The Ritz-Carlton Residences, Sunny Isles Beach
metaDescription: The Ritz-Carlton Residences, Sunny Isles Beach is a luxury residential oceanfront building.These spacious residences will feature terraces with 360-degree views of the expansive ocean.
seoTitle: The Ritz-Carlton Residences Sunny Isles Beach
body: The Ritz-Carlton Residences, Sunny Isles Beach is a luxury residential oceanfront building. A winding driveway, facing the ocean, leads up to the stunning 649 ft. residential tower, composed of 212

—including four penthouses with private pools. This is one of the few standalone Ritz-Carlton Residences in the world and the building will blend the recognized service of The Ritz-Carlton brand with contemporary architecture, stunning ocean views and distinguished style.

Designed to provide sweeping views of the Atlantic Ocean, it is set upon a quiet barrier island bounded by the Atlantic Ocean to the east and the Intracoastal Waterway to the west. The property will feature 2.2 acres of lush landscaping, pools and private beach amenities. The spacious residence
will feature cascading terraces with 360-degree views of the expansive ocean along with breathtaking views of the city skyline and the Intracoastal Waterway.

The immaculate interiors incorporate the finest in Italian craftsmanship by designer Michele Bönan. Residents can choose between 2- 3- and 4-bedroom homes and four top-floor penthouses, with no more than five residences per floor.
Spacious floor plans range from 1,605 to 3,640 square feet with glass walls and balconies that leave nothing between you and an oceanfront lifestyle.

Each of the penthouses are complete with flow-through layouts, private rooftop pools, garden terraces, summer kitchens, 13-foot ceilings, separate service quarters, impeccable finishes and fixtures, and up to five large bedrooms, starting at 6,000 square feet of total space.
The Ritz-Carlton Residences for sale located in Sunny Isles Beach are in the preconstruction sales phase

body: Turnberry Ocean Club Residences is one of Miami’s newest and most sophisticated condominiums to open on Sunny Isles Beach. Welcome to Turnberry Ocean Club Residences, an exclusive condo building by Fontainebleau Development. The building tops off at 54 floors boasting an all-glass ultra-luxe design.
The luxury homes range from about 2,900 square feet to over 10,000 square feet. Residences are available in 3 to 6 bedroom

featuring an ocean and bay terrace, summer kitchen, 10-foot ceilings, and staff quarters. Sitting directly on the ocean, this building features all flow-through residences, each with direct, unobstructed ocean and Intracoastal views. See

A three-story dramatic glass lobby, to an incredible three-level amenity deck on the 30th floor, with swimming pools, pool bar, fitness center, and cabanas. name: Twenty-Nine Indian Creek
metaDescription: Twenty-Nine Indian Creek-a collection of only 11 beautiful residences in the Faena District
body: Twenty-Nine Indian Creek is situated in Miami Beach's most prominent cultural district, The Faena District. It's comprised of a collection of 11 distinct residences, 8 condos, 2 townhomes, and 1 full-floor penthouse.

The two completely restored, one-of-a-kind townhomes have been hidden from view since the 1960s, and pay homage to the art deco design of the past era. The townhomes at Twenty-Nine Indian Creek provide a peaceful haven and sanctuary amidst the bustling neighborhood.

They include elegant 18' double height ceilings, private landscaped patios with summer kitchens, and a full-floor primary suite. Twenty-Nine Indian Creek was conceptualized by Urban Robot, a full-service design firm, and combines serene interiors and fine architectural detailing.

The area's natural surroundings are beautifully highlighted in the carefully selected materials, evoking an immediate sense of tranquility. Floor-plans for the condo residences range from 2 to 4 bedrooms, the 2 townhomes include 2 bedrooms and 2.5 baths, while the penthouse residence offers 5 bedrooms and 4.5 baths. See

metaDescription: LiveModern is for the modern enthusiast - a new way to search for the best modern luxury real estate in South Florida. Featuring modern condos and homes in Palm Beach, Ft Lauderdale & Miami
body: Una is an Iconic tower known for its smooth, metallic surface resembling the shape of a wave. The luxury building provides residents with unobstructed waterfront views and a seamless transition between indoors and outdoors with floor to ceiling sliding doors. The dramatic waterfront condominium houses 135 residences over 47 floors.

The condominium offers two to five-bedroom homes ranging in size from 1,100 to 4,700 square feet. Every room within the home includes floor to ceiling windows allowing natural lighting to flow through the open
. Each residence was designed similarly to a yacht, bringing a sense of elegance and comfort to the rooms while celebrating the pleasures of life on the bay. The modern curves of
are complemented by the richly landscaped gardens, while inside there are striking views of the water at every turn.

Una’s amenities represent the best of leisure, wellness, and entertainment. All amenities are set around Biscayne Bay and designed to complement the building's sleek, maritime style. The residents can enjoy a large selection of pools, including a lap pool, kids splash area, and whirlpool.

A bayfront pool also allows for a quiet and relaxing place to watch the sunset. A state-of-the-art fitness center with wall-to-wall glass windows provides a beautiful workout space while overlooking the water. Residences of Una are also given exclusive access to the Grand Bay Club located in Key Biscayne.

At The Grand Bay Club residents can enjoy the many amenities offered, like beach services and dining. Una provides guests with multiple spaces to relax, work out, socialize, and immerse themselves in the bayside setting.

Each newly built home focuses on first class luxury service and lifestyle. All condo homes give views from downtown to the ocean through 9' floor to ceiling windows and expansive terraces. The W comes fully furnished with all state of the art appliances. Moving into your new home at The W could not be any easier.
The W offers whatever you need whenever you need it. There full time valet service, concierge service, and text for easy communication on deliveries and guest arrivals.

There are two swimming pools, the Wet East is a heated pool with an oceanfront view, and the Wet West is a private saltwater pool: both can receive food and beverage service from WET Bar and Grill. Focus on resetting your mind and body at the fitness center and full-service spa.

From casual meals to fancy date nights, there are multiple restaurant options without even leaving your building. The W Residences provides top quality care and service for its residents, leaving no need unmet.

body: The Water Club introduces its third and final tower, The Encore. A boutique condominium featuring innovative design with cutting edge features on the bright blue waters of North Palm Beach. This community offers two towers that were built in 2018 and The Encore its newest addition completed in October 2020.

The towers allow for through-views from the Atlantic Ocean, Lake Worth Lagoon, and Intracoastal Waterways. Encore offers 30 exclusive residences in a 16-story building with only two residences per floor. The condo offers three bedrooms with an optional den from 2,500 to 3,200 square feet.

Private access elevators readily transport residents from the covered parking garage right to their front door. Privacy will be enjoyed inside and outside of Encore homes, when guests come to town book the guest suites offered downstairs.

Creating a carefree, resort style living experience, Water Club has top of the line amenities on its nine-acre site. Water Club features an unparalleled private club lifestyle at the water's edge close to all the shopping, dining, and golf in Palm Beach Gardens.

Residents of Water Club in North Palm will enjoy incomparable views and top of the line amenities including a Residents Club with two pools, a fitness center, private sandy beach and more, as well as dedicated boat slips for those who want to enjoy life on the water but with the convenience of a high rise living- very rare combination in Palm Beach County!
